abstract: A rectangle for requesting a cropped version of the original image.
overview:
## Discussion

To request a cropped image, specify the crop rectangle in a unit coordinate space relative to the image. In this coordinate system, the point `{0.0,0.0}` refers to the upper left corner of the image, and the point `{1.0,1.0}` refers to the opposite corner regardless of the image’s aspect ratio.

This property defaults to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGRectZero], which specifies no cropping.

If you specify a crop rectangle, you must also specify the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageRequestOptionsResizeMode/exact] option for the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageRequestOptions/resizeMode] property.

# normalizedCropRect

**Instance Property**

A rectangle for requesting a cropped version of the original image.

## Declaration

```swift
var normalizedCropRect: CGRect { get set }
```

## Discussion

To request a cropped image, specify the crop rectangle in a unit coordinate space relative to the image. In this coordinate system, the point `{0.0,0.0}` refers to the upper left corner of the image, and the point `{1.0,1.0}` refers to the opposite corner regardless of the image’s aspect ratio.

This property defaults to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGRectZero], which specifies no cropping.

If you specify a crop rectangle, you must also specify the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageRequestOptionsResizeMode/exact] option for the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageRequestOptions/resizeMode] property.

## Specifying Image Request Options

- **version**: The version of the image to be requested.
- **PHImageRequestOptionsVersion**: Options for requesting an image asset with or without adjustments, used by the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageRequestOptions/version] property.
- **deliveryMode**: The requested image quality and delivery priority.
- **PHImageRequestOptionsDeliveryMode**: Options for delivering requested image data, used by the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageRequestOptions/deliveryMode] property.
- **resizeMode**: A mode that specifies how to resize the requested image.
- **PHImageRequestOptionsResizeMode**: Options for how to resize the requested image to fit a target size, used by the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageRequestOptions/resizeMode] property.
